location: Dropped by Godrick Soldiers patrolling Gatefront Ruins, Limgrave — the earliest and easiest farming spot. Also dropped by soldier-type enemies of every major faction throughout the game (Raya Lucaria, Radahn, Leyndell, Mausoleum, and Haligtree Soldiers).
tactics: From the Gatefront Site of Grace, patrolling soldiers carry this sword with roughly a 2% drop chance each.
It's one of the most common weapon drops in the game, so any straight-sword-wielding soldier faction can substitute if you'd rather farm elsewhere.
No boss or special mechanic involved — just repeatedly kill and rest to respawn soldiers.
lore: A well-made straight sword of once-fine craftsmanship, carried by rank-and-file soldiers of a lord's army — its blade is scarred and blackened from hard use, much like the mindless men who still wield it.

builds.name: Beginner Str/Dex
builds.why: Even D/D scaling and near-universal availability make it a solid throwaway early weapon before committing to a build.
